tool_args.label: Parking Fee Structure at the LIRR Westbury Parking Garage
tool_args.raw_text: The Long Island Rail Road (LIRR) seeks MTA Board approval to establish parking fees for 300 unrestricted daily parking spaces located in the newly constructed Westbury Parking Garage. The State of the art, 4 level, ungated garage is expected to open in March 2021.

payload.project_name: Parking Fee Structure at the LIRR Westbury Parking Garage
payload.description: LIRR seeks MTA Board approval to establish parking fees for 300 unrestricted daily parking spaces in the newly constructed Westbury Parking Garage, a 4-level ungated garage expected to open in March 2021, constructed as part of LIRR's Main Line Expansion project.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Winter Trackwork Programs & Schedule Adjustments (January 2021)
tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to adjust schedules for a Signal Cutover to support Jamaica Capacity Improvements, Third Rail State of Good Repair Work on the Atlantic Branch, a Rail Drop on the Port Washington Branch, and a Signal Cutover of the New Nassau 1 Interlocking in support of the Main Line Expansion Project.

payload.description: LIRR plan to adjust schedules for Signal Cutover to support Jamaica Capacity Improvements, Third Rail State of Good Repair Work on the Atlantic Branch, Rail Drop on the Port Washington Branch, and Signal Cutover of the New Nassau 1 Interlocking in support of the Main Line Expansion Project. New schedules effective January 25, 2021.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: MNR and LIRR Escalator Maintenance and Repair Services
tool_args.raw_text: Metro-North Railroad (\"MNR\") requests that the Board adopt a resolution declaring that competitive, sealed bidding is impractical or inappropriate and that it is therefore in the public interest to use the competitive Request for Proposal (RFP) process, pursuant to Public Authorities Law Section 1265-a, for solicitation of maintenance, inspection and repair services for a total of 53 escalators for MNR and Long Island Rail Road (\"LIRR\") combined.

payload.project_name: Maintenance, Inspection and Repair Services for MNR and LIRR Escalators
payload.description: MNR requests Board approval to use competitive RFP process for maintenance, inspection and repair services for a total of 53 escalators for MNR and LIRR combined: MNR's 15 escalators in Grand Central Terminal and 2 at White Plains station; LIRR's 20 escalators at various commuter stations and 16 in Penn Station.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Customer Service Initiative - Outlying Stations
tool_args.raw_text: The CSI project will enhance the customers' experience and improve operations with a system-wide upgrade of the public address, visual information and video surveillance/access control systems at twenty (20) Metro-North stations and facilities throughout New York. This project also includes upgrades to elevator monitoring providing network connectivity for new and existing equipment and real-time data improvements.

payload.project_name: Customer Service Initiative (CSI) - Outlying Stations Public Announcement/Visual Information and Surveillance/Access Control Systems
payload.description: System-wide upgrade of public address, visual information and video surveillance/access control systems at 20 Metro-North stations and facilities throughout New York, including elevator monitoring upgrades.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Station Improvement Initiatives at Harlem-125th Street, Riverdale, Crestwood, White Plains and Port Chester
tool_args.raw_text: The purpose of this project is to develop and improve station aesthetics, introduce new technology, and develop sustainability initiatives.

payload.project_name: Station Improvement Initiatives at Harlem-125th Street, Riverdale, Crestwood, White Plains and Port Chester
payload.description: Develop and improve station aesthetics, introduce new technology, and develop sustainability initiatives. White Plains Station improvements include renovated waiting room, new bathrooms, upgraded HVAC, Wi-Fi, charging stations, benches, new heated side platform, new island platform canopy, and entrance enhancements.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: LIRR Positive Train Control (PTC)
tool_args.raw_text: Planning, design, and implementation of a Positive Train Control (PTC) System on all main-line tracks is complete. The PTC System will prevent train-to-train collisions, overspeed derailments, incursions into established work zone limits, and the movement of a train through an improperly aligned switch.

payload.description: Planning, design, and implementation of a Positive Train Control (PTC) System on all LIRR main-line tracks. Will prevent train-to-train collisions, overspeed derailments, incursions into work zone limits, and movement of train through improperly aligned switch.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Moynihan Train Hall - LIRR
tool_args.raw_text: The Moynihan Train Hall [MTH] project converted Back of House [BOH] areas of the Farley Post Office to a world class Train Hall with a vaulted glass ceiling for Amtrak and the Long Island Rail Road.

payload.description: The Moynihan Train Hall project converted Back of House areas of the Farley Post Office to a world class Train Hall with a vaulted glass ceiling for Amtrak and the Long Island Rail Road. The former James A. Farley Post Office Building is located across from New York Penn Station along 8th Avenue.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.raw_text: The PSNY – 33rd Corridor Phase I project provided a new entrance at 33rd Street and 7th Avenue with three new escalators and one staircase from the street level to the LIRR 33rd Street Connecting Concourse and associated work.

tool_args.label: Power, C&S Infrastructure Restoration - Sandy (Hudson Line)
tool_args.raw_text: The purpose of this project is to replace and restore to a state of good repair through a design-build contract the power and communication and signal (C&S) equipment and infrastructure that were destroyed, damaged and/or compromised by Superstorm Sandy on over 30 miles of railroad along the Hudson Line from CP 5 (Bronx) to CP 35 (Croton-Harmon).

payload.description: Replace and restore to a state of good repair through a design-build contract the power and communication and signal (C&S) equipment and infrastructure destroyed, damaged and/or compromised by Superstorm Sandy on over 30 miles of railroad along the Hudson Line from CP 5 (Bronx) to CP 35 (Croton-Harmon).

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.

tool_args.label: Winter Storm Gail Impact on LIRR
tool_args.raw_text: On December 16, 2020, Winter Storm Gail made its way through the New York area. An enhanced weekend service plan was implemented on Thursday December 17, 2020 to allow for cleanup and safe operations. Over the three-day storm period, the LIRR sustained 263 late/canceled/terminated trains. The average delay was 16.1 minutes.

payload.description: Winter Storm Gail made its way through the New York area. Over the three-day storm period, the LIRR sustained 263 late/canceled/terminated trains.

tool_args.label: LIRR December 2020 Ridership Loss Attributable to COVID-19
tool_args.raw_text: The December 2020 ridership loss is attributed to the impact of COVID-19.

payload.claim_text: The December 2020 ridership loss is attributed to the impact of COVID-19.

tool_args.label: MNR December 2020 Ridership Decrease Attributed to COVID-19 and Snowstorm
tool_args.raw_text: Large decreases in December ridership was attributed to the Covid-19 Pandemic. Ridership was also adversely impacted by a two-day snowstorm (December 16-17) where 10.5 inches of snow was recorded in NYC Central Park vs. only 2.5 inches of snow last December.

payload.claim_text: Large decreases in December ridership was attributed to the Covid-19 Pandemic. Ridership was also adversely impacted by a two-day snowstorm (December 16-17) where 10.5 inches of snow was recorded in NYC Central Park vs. only 2.5 inches of snow last December.

tool_args.label: LIRR Performance Metrics Improvement Despite COVID-19
